title: podocarpus oblongus
intro: Podocarpus oblongus, also known as the yellow podocarpus, is a species of coniferous tree native to New Zealand. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, derived from its essential oils and resins. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to relieve respiratory issues, reduce fever, and alleviate pain, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve circulation. In herbal preparations, the leaves and resin of the podocarpus oblongus are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
